message:
feat: add delayed Copilot comment follow-up workflow (#5738) (#5743)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,88 @@
+name: Copilot Comment Follow-up
+
+# Check for unaddressed Copilot review comments on recently merged PRs.
+# Runs 10 minutes after merge to give Copilot time to post its review.
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+  issues: write
+  pull-requests: read
+
+# Debounce: if multiple merges happen quickly, only the last one runs
+concurrency:
+  group: copilot-comment-followup
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+jobs:
+  check-copilot-comments:
+    name: Check Copilot comments
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
+    steps:
+      - name: Wait for Copilot review to arrive
+        run: |
+          # Copilot reviews arrive asynchronously — wait 10 minutes
+          echo "Waiting 10 minutes for Copilot review comments to arrive..."
+          sleep 600
+
+      - name: Check for unaddressed comments
+        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        with:
+          github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+          script: |
+            // Find the PR that was just merged (from the push event)
+            const { data: prs } = await github.rest.pulls.list({
+              owner: context.repo.owner,
+              repo: context.repo.repo,
+              state: 'closed',
+              sort: 'updated',
+              direction: 'desc',
+              per_page: 5,
+            })
+
+            const mergedPR = prs.find(pr => pr.merged_at && pr.merge_commit_sha === context.sha)
+            if (!mergedPR) {
+              core.info('No merged PR found for this push — skipping')
+              return
+            }
+
+            core.info(`Checking PR #${mergedPR.number}: ${mergedPR.title}`)
+
+            // Get review comments
+            const { data: comments } = await github.rest.pulls.listReviewComments({
+              owner: context.repo.owner,
+              repo: context.repo.repo,
+              pull_number: mergedPR.number,
+              per_page: 100,
+            })
+
+            const copilotComments = comments.filter(c =>
+              /copilot/i.test(c.user?.login || '')
+            )
+
+            if (copilotComments.length === 0) {
+              core.info('No Copilot comments found — all clear')
+              return
+            }
+
+            core.info(`Found ${copilotComments.length} Copilot comment(s)`)
+
+            // Format comments into an issue body
+            const commentList = copilotComments.map(c =>
+              `- **${c.path}:${c.line || c.original_line}**: ${c.body.substring(0, 200)}${c.body.length > 200 ? '...' : ''}`
+            ).join('\n')
+
+            // Create a follow-up issue
+            const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.create({
+              owner: context.repo.owner,
+              repo: context.repo.repo,
+              title: `[Copilot Review] ${copilotComments.length} comment(s) on merged PR #${mergedPR.number}`,
+              body: `## Copilot Review Comments\n\nPR #${mergedPR.number} (**${mergedPR.title}**) was merged with ${copilotComments.length} Copilot review comment(s) that should be addressed in a follow-up:\n\n${commentList}\n\n**PR:** ${mergedPR.html_url}\n\n---\n*Auto-generated by copilot-comment-followup workflow*`,
+              labels: ['kind/enhancement', 'ai-generated', 'triage/accepted'],
+            })
+
+            core.info(`Created follow-up issue #${issue.number}`)
